name: Alopecia & Hair Loss

intro: This page should speak to adults and adolescents who are worried about sudden shedding, patchy loss, post-illness hair fall, postpartum changes, stress-related thinning, or long-term pattern loss.

Diffuse shedding after stress, illness, or medication changes
Hair fall associated with dandruff or scalp sensitivity
